subject: fix(lint): resolve all ESLint errors and harden PWA manifest
body:
Three pre-existing lint issues fixed:

1. usePWAInstall.ts — setState called synchronously in useEffect.
   Moved early beforeinstallprompt consumption to module-level variable
   so both useRef initializer and useState initializer read it without
   triggering cascading renders or reading refs during render.

2. DebugBanner.tsx — useCallback missing canInstall dependency.
   Added canInstall to the dependency array so diagnostics re-run
   when install state changes.

3. vite.config.ts — PWA manifest missing id and prefer_related_applications.
   Added id: '/' for stable app identity across redeployments and
   prefer_related_applications: false to prevent Chrome from suppressing
   the beforeinstallprompt event.

ESLint now passes with 0 errors, 0 warnings.

Tags: lint, pwa, hooks, code-quality
